title: Boao 6 Pieces Mini Spatula, Multicolor Makeup Spatula, Small Tiny Spatula for Cosmetics and Kitchen Jar Food Bottle, 3 Sizes(Red, Orange, Blue, Green, Purple, Black)
description:
About this item
No more waste: the silicone spatula features enough long body and narrow head to get all the content out of your container item, which means no more wasted product
Safe material: the makeup silicone spatula is made of a strong and elastic material, the head has the right flexibility to easily bypass the curves and corners of the container, so it works for most containers
Versatile application: the makeup spatulas can also be applied for cosmetics, hand body lotion, lip gloss, nail polish, foods like mustard jar, butter, ketchup and countless other every day items
Easy to clean: one-piece seamless design keep it sturdy without break case and easy to clean, save your energy and time, bring convenience for you life
What you'll get: 1 set including 6 pieces silicone spatula in 6 different colors, 2 x large spatula (12 inch) in red and orange color, 2 x medium spatula (9 inch) in green and blue color, 2 x small spatula (6 inch) in purple and black color, different sizes and various colors to meet your different needs
reviews_5s: I gave these out as stocking gifts! These are so handy to get the last of mustard, peanut butter, and syrup containers. I even reserve one for lotion and cosmetic containers now. This is one of the products that one wonders "why didn't we have this before"?!!But they are not very flexableI’ve been putting off on ordering these. Finally decided to. The blades are a bit firmer than I expected, but that’s OKThese spatulas work great on getting lotion out of the bottom of a large pump bottle. Not wasting lotion anymore. Also using to mix acrylic craft paint in bottles. They work great for both and are easy, easy to clean!There are different sizes to choose from so they work great for me with my different size jars!Wow! Came in just a days time and perfect for my needs. More sturdy and less expensive than a previous brand. Can’t beat that!Ease of useI love to get out that las bit and this helps. Easy to clean. I didn’t need more than 2 so I shared with friends.Recommend after searching and comparing many. Best value, sizes allow for multiple uses. My daughter & I split the set. Both of us like these.These spatulas come in handy for the tiny jars of food or lotion that's impossible to get. I put some in the kitchen and some in the bathroom. I rinse them off rather than put them in the dishwasher, so I can have them forever. Great idea, awesome product!
reviews_1s:
The lime green item in this order broke at the end as soon as it was removed from packing. I put it aside and did not use it.
The item is very fragile and extremely thin silicon enclosing a metal shaft
The shaft has a sharp end that immediately poked through the silicon making this item unusable
I have regretted buying this product but am not able to return it as the return window closed a couple of months ago
I have been bothered by this and decided others need to know before making the same mistake I made in making this purchaseI loved the idea of this product but the reality fell short. The business end of this scraper/spatula is floppy and just lays over when you use it. In addition to that, where the spatula part folds over a wire pokes through the silicon material. If I continue to use it, I expect the end part to come off. Great idea, but useless.Aren't spatulas supposed to be rigid? Not all flimsy and smear everything around WASTING it. Waste of my money, buying these AND in product. Doesn't even clean well. Even with isopropyl I cant clean these. I hate them. They bend with no resistance. Every single one. Don't waste your money! What an embarrassing product. Rip off for sure.Haven’t had a chance to try the product yet, but very annoyed that the tube was open in the package and the smallest spatula was not in there. It’s too much hassle to return a ten dollar item, but I am not happy.The spatula tip is very flimsy and won't scrape the bottom edge of a jar clean. The metal rod inside pokes through the thin silicone after a few uses. Threw them out.The spatulas are too flimsy (should have read the reviews) the container advertised as a bonus was absolute garbage and was missing a cap!! Way too expensive for such low quality. Returning for sure.Metal was sticking out of top end on arrival. Sent back. Don't buy.flimsy. metal prong inside poked thru rubber immediately.Muy mal construido. Tiene un metal interno para darle forma y cuando se acaba la parte metálica la punta es tan débil que no sirve para nada. Devuelto al día siguiente.le spatole sono troppo morbide e non riescono a prendere nulla, le ho dovute restituire. Peccato perchè potevano essere molto comode.
